primary.$description: Run button orange: intentional a11y exception. Fails 4.5:1 with white labels but kept for its deep user association with "run" (and Blockly's run blocks).
Bumped to level 70 (brand-guideline primary is 50) so white labels pass 4.5:1; strong sits at 90.

neutral.$description: Intentionally matches the background state-selected color.

primary.$description: Selected state is mode-inverted and cross-family by design: brand fill + seafoam text in light, seafoam fill + navy text in dark.

primary-inverse.$description: Selected state is mode-inverted and cross-family by design: brand fill + seafoam text in light, seafoam fill + navy text in dark.

primary.$description: Bumped to level 70 (brand-guideline primary is 50) so white labels pass 4.5:1; strong sits at 90.
Stays at level 50 (unlike the bumped background primary at 70) since border contrast only needs 3:1.

neutral.$description: Intentionally matches the background state-selected color.

inverse.$description: Intentionally matches the background state-selected color.
